item.name: Get list of all document splitters

request.name: Get list of all document splitters

description.content: Returns all the document splitters visible to the user.

query.description: The number of documents to skip before starting to collect the result set.
The numbers of results to return.
Allows you to include public splitters in the response when you're filtering by organization.

variable.description: The instance region. Use 'api' for AUS/Global, 'api.us1' for US, or 'api.eu1' for EU. You can find your region in the Affinda web app URL. (This can only be one of api,api.eu1,api.us1)

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Split / merge / rotate / delete pages of a document.
Documents with multiple pages can be splitted into multiple documents, or merged into one document.
Each page can also be rotated. Edit operations will trigger re-parsing of the documents involved.

variable.description: (Required) Document's identifier
The instance region. Use 'api' for AUS/Global, 'api.us1' for US, or 'api.eu1' for EU. You can find your region in the Affinda web app URL. (This can only be one of api,api.eu1,api.us1)

response.name: Successfully edited the document and re-parsing is underway.
